metadata.description: Sam's financial modelling and Excel audit skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: financial-modelling
plugins.description: The CRaFT financial model build lifecycle: orchestrated Scope, Plan, Design, Build, Test and Implement phases for constructing Excel financial models.

plugins.name: audit-general
plugins.description: The Excel model audit suite: a coordinated family of specialist auditors (logic, errors, formatting, language, efficiency, structure, hyperlinks, VBA, Power Query) with an orchestrating audit manager and client-ready reporting.

plugins.name: writing-tools
plugins.description: Editorial toolkit in Liam Bastick's voice: a DAX function blog writer, a book-length prose writer, an auditor that checks articles against UK English and house style rules with tracked-changes Word output, and a daily AI blog pipeline (search → plan → write) that produces short-form AI news posts with brand-styled Gemini images and Mermaid flow charts.
